title: rubus cognobilis
intro: Rubus cognobilis, also known as the Black Raspberry or Black Cap Thimbleberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, characterized by its dark purple to black fruit and edible leaves. The medicinal properties of Rubus cognobilis include its high antioxidant content and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Rubus cognobilis include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Rubus cognobilis can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as used in jams, jellies, and other food products, making it a valuable plant for both medicinal and culinary purposes.
